## Proof of work (required — AI output alone isn't enough)

A PR that "should work" but was never run gets closed. Show it ran:

- [ ] ✅ **`uv run pytest tests/` green** (paste the output)
- [ ] ▶️ **Ran the behavior** — `curl`/httpie transcript for an endpoint, or a short recording/GIF for streaming (SSE / audio)
- [ ] 🧪 **What I actually tested** — the real steps:
